description: Style NoteTaking the bright colours of summer and nature, vero moda inspires the woman of style and substance to experiment with a range of vibrant shades. So match the shade to your personality! Product DetailsBlack tube dress with detachable shoulder straps, has an elasticated straight neckline, slightly elasticated and smocked at the waist, gathered from the waist down, white sash at the back, asymmetric hemline and inner liningMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash cold at 40 degrees using a mild detergentDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanUse cold ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M which measures 80 cm from the neckline to the longest pont of hemline
